prompt: Implement a product catalog page with: a search bar with debounced input, a sidebar with collapsible filter groups (price range slider, category checkboxes, rating stars filter, in-stock toggle), a grid/list view toggle, product cards showing image placeholder, title, price, rating stars, and add-to-cart button, and pagination at the bottom. Store the filter/view state in the URL query params so it's shareable. Use Zustand for the cart with an item count badge in the header.
